---
pagetitle: "Arnaud Raulet | Decision Science · France-Japan"
description: "Decision Science, Marketing Analytics and Japan Intelligence"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    page-layout: article
    toc: false
body-classes: home
---

:::: column-screen
::: hero-banner
::: hero-title
Turn your data into decisions.
:::

::: hero-subtitle
Data scientist based in Japan, I help companies separate what they truly know from what they merely believe.
:::

Causal analysis, marketing analytics, Japan technology intelligence.

[Book a discovery call](/contact/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg} [See my services](/services/){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::
::::

## The problem

You have data. But do you have answers?

Most companies believe that more data equals better decisions. In reality, they drown in correlations without ever reaching causality.

> *"Our campaign generated +15% in sales"* — Really? Or was the market already rising?
>
> *"This segment is more profitable"* — But why? And what should you actually do about it?

I don't build dashboards. I deliver clarity.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## What I bring
::: {.column-page}
:::::: grid
::: g-col-md-4
### 🎯 Decision Science

Going beyond correlations. Identifying what **truly causes** your results, quantifying uncertainty, making robust decisions even with imperfect data.
:::

::: g-col-md-4
### 📊 Marketing Analytics

Understanding what **actually works**: rigorous attribution, actionable segmentation, value-based pricing — not gut feeling.
:::

::: g-col-md-4
### 🇯🇵 Japan Intelligence

10+ years in Japan. I make readable the Japanese data hidden behind the language barrier: patents, R&D signals, competitive and partner positioning.
:::
::::::
:::
[Explore my services in detail →](/services/)

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Who is this for?

I work with:

-   **SMEs and mid-size companies** who want answers, not reports
-   **Marketing teams** who need to prove (or disprove) their intuitions
-   **European companies** who need to understand what Japanese players in their sector are doing — before deciding.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## My approach

**Rigour. Clarity. Action.**

My approach combines causal analysis and Bayesian reasoning. Concretely: every analysis ends with an actionable recommendation and a clear quantification of uncertainty.

You will know what you can assert — and what remains to be verified.

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Background

::::: grid
::: g-col-md-6
**Nearly 10 years** of experience in Japan

**Trilingual** French, Japanese, English

**Data Scientist** specialised in causal analysis and Bayesian methods
:::

::: g-col-md-6
**Field + Technical**: I understand business realities as much as statistical methods

**Based in Tokyo**, working with clients in France, Japan and internationally
:::
:::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

::: contact-section
## Ready to see clearly in your data?

Book a 30-minute discovery call. We identify together whether I can help you, and how.

No pitch. No commitment. Just a conversation.

[Book a discovery call](/contact/){.btn .btn-primary .btn-lg} [Email me](mailto:contact-quarto-site.le77r@simplelogin.com){.btn .btn-outline-secondary .btn-lg}
:::
